body_txt: Uncharacteristically suggestive comments and thoughts from a character usually considered pure and innocent . Sometimes this is played straight and shows that a character is mature or smart enough to notice subtle themes their friends don't. Most of the time it's a trait given to a shy character to show they're not quite as mousy and meek as we think. Usually cued by fantasy segues becoming more and more lewd. This will always be fiercely denied by the character, especially if they're cantankerous and dismissive . The more comedic princess-like types often get this too until it turns into a more overt Running Gag . Such a character may be subject to a Playful "Perv" Accusation if others notice hints of their perverted aspects peeking out from the facade they've established. Note that the title refers to covertness in the figurative sense, not the literal . This trope is also Truth in Television — you know who you are. Don't say it; otherwise, you won't be one anymore. If the Covert Pervert is outed, they may be subject to a girl getting set to Pervert Revenge Mode or even an Unprovoked Pervert Payback . Compare Naughty by Night and Seemingly Wholesome '50s Girl . Contrast Oblivious Pervert , for characters who seem perverted because of their actions but aren't. May overlap with Chivalrous Pervert if the character is portrayed as morally righteous, especially regarding sexual ethics. noreallife
